---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new mode, workflow, or packaging improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Request

Describe the feature you want.

## Use case

Who is this for and what are they trying to do?

## Suggested input or output

If relevant, show an example prompt, input bundle, or desired output format.

## Notes

Keep private chats, recordings, and personal data out of public issues.
